required_operator_inputs: land explaino_cmap as the first missing broad reusable Palette row after the already-shipped heatmap, phase_wheel_palette, and banded_heatmap rows
anchor explaino_cmap semantics to the legacy ExplainO CMap oracle instead of the basin/root palette lineage
use explicit palette owner fields and runtime-backed coverage instead of descriptor-only coverage or overloading the existing heatmap, phase wheel, or banded heatmap owners
preserve the separation between broad reusable palette work and the later family-gated root_classic_palette / joy_root_palette slices
forbidden_operator_prompts: ship explaino_cmap as descriptor-only or draft-only after claiming the slice landed
borrow the basin/root palette lineage for explaino_cmap instead of using the legacy ExplainO CMap oracle
reuse heatmap, phase_wheel_palette, or banded_heatmap owner fields for explaino_cmap instead of giving it a dedicated palette owner pack
widen the family-gated root palettes or Grading in the same slice

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 4 explaino_cmap contract validates successfully
The advanced color library foundation phased plan stays synchronized during the explaino_cmap slice
